nodes.name: .cursorrules
nodes.summary: Cursor IDE configuration defining agent rules for the Hydra project — architecture constraints, language-specific coding rules (C# .NET 10 with System.IO.Pipelines, Python asyncio), critical SSM constraint (n_tokens > n_past), and logging requirements.

nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build context exclusion rules — excludes .git, build artifacts, Python cache files, node_modules, logs, and critically excludes the llama-cpp submodule source.

nodes.name: .editorconfig
nodes.summary: EditorConfig for consistent indentation and formatting — tabs, 3-space indent for general files, 2-space for YAML/JSON/C#, C# brace style rules, Python/C++ tab indentation.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template — Coordinator host/port, node configs for RTX (127.0.0.1:9601/:8080) and P100 (192.168.122.21:9602/:8081), llama-server RPC port settings.

nodes.name: PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
nodes.summary: GitHub PR template — requires Summary, Changes list, Closes keyword for issue linking, and a Test plan checklist (unit/integration/system tests).

nodes.name: ci.yml
nodes.summary: Main CI pipeline — 4 job types: build-test (unit tests for Shared/Store/Agent/Coordinator), integration (on main or labeled PRs), system-mocked, system-full (requires workflow_dispatch), deploy-llama (tag-based). Creates GitHub issues on failures. References Hydra.sln, VERSION file.

nodes.name: claude-code-review.yml
nodes.summary: Claude Code PR review workflow — runs on pull request events, uses anthropics/claude-code-action to post inline review comments focusing on correctness bugs, security vulnerabilities, and design issues.

nodes.name: monitor.yml
nodes.summary: Prometheus alert monitoring — runs every 30 minutes, calls python scripts/create_monitoring_issues.py to sync firing alerts to GitHub issues. Depends on infra services (Prometheus :9091, Grafana :3000).

nodes.name: opencode-resolve.yml
nodes.summary: Triggers OpenCode AI agent to resolve review comments — fires on pull_request_review submitted when claude-code-review bot posts changes_requested or commented.

nodes.name: opencode.yml
nodes.summary: OpenCode AI agent activation — listens for /oc or /opencode comments on issues/PRs, falls back to GitHub Actions bot if local OpenCode server is down.

nodes.name: pr-issue-link.yml
nodes.summary: PR issue linking check — validates PR body contains closing keyword (Closes/Fixes/Resolves #XX) before merge. Posts/removes warning comment. Used by ci.yml (imported).

nodes.name: .gitignore
nodes.summary: Git ignore rules — excludes .NET build outputs (bin/obj), Python artifacts, C++ build outputs, IDE files, secrets (.pem), test results, and deploy.log.

nodes.name: .gitmodules
nodes.summary: Git submodule definition — src/llama-cpp points to ggml-org/llama.cpp repo on the hydra-state-streaming branch, providing the 3 KV state streaming endpoints.

nodes.name: .opencodeignore
nodes.summary: OpenCode AI agent ignore rules — mirrors .gitignore exclusions for build artifacts, IDE files, and test results.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Understand-anything analysis exclusion config — references patterns from .gitignore as commented suggestions for excluding build artifacts and test results from knowledge graph analysis.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent instructions — short entry point directing agents to read CLAUDE.md first, then workflow docs. Maps Plane for planning, GitHub for PRs/CI issues, DevelopmentRunBook.md for build/test commands.

nodes.name: AGENT_TOOLS_GUIDE.md
nodes.summary: Guide for using coding agent tools (question + todowrite) — patterns for making decisions, tracking progress, and handling ambiguity during development tasks.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Changelog following keepachangelog format — versions 0.0.1 through 0.4.0, tracking M0/M1/M2 milestones and bug fixes across Store/Agent/Coordinator services.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Main project documentation — architecture diagram, language decisions, critical facts (P100 prefill 110t/s, n_tokens > n_past constraint), llama.cpp fork endpoints, milestone table (M0-M5 + Phase 0 + M-Perf), task lifecycle, GitHub workflow, monitoring setup.

nodes.name: DevelopmentRunBook.md
nodes.summary: Development runbook — service map with ports, prerequisites (.NET 10 SDK, Python >=3.13, tmpfs), quick start (start-env.sh), VS Code debug configs, test commands per project, environment variables, llama-server build instructions for sm_120/sm_60, CI/CD deploy process, monitoring setup.

nodes.name: Hydra.runsettings
nodes.summary: Dotnet run settings — disables parallel assembly execution to avoid port/connection contention during test runs.

nodes.name: Hydra.sln
nodes.summary: Visual Studio solution file — 6 C# projects: Hydra.Shared, Tests.Shared, Hydra.Store, Tests.Store, Hydra.Agent, Tests.Agent, Tests.Integration. All nested under 'src' solution folder.

nodes.name: PROJECT_PLAN.md
nodes.summary: Project plan — vision, architecture diagram with service ports, language decisions table, 4-tier routing algorithm reference, tech stack comparison (C# vs Python), full project structure detail for src/ hierarchy.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project README — high-level architecture, component table (Store/Agent/Coordinator), milestone overview, verified facts, quick start commands.

nodes.name: VERSION
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for project version — currently 0.7.6. Used by CI deploy job, Coordinator/Agent/Store version endpoints, and structlog/Serilog structured logging.

nodes.name: CI Pipeline
nodes.summary: Full CI pipeline with build-test, integration, system-mocked, system-full, deploy-hydra, deploy-llama jobs. Deploys via podman-compose using docker-compose.hydra.yml and docker-compose.infra.yml.

nodes.name: PR Issue Link Check
nodes.summary: Validation pipeline ensuring PRs link to issues via closing keywords. Imported by ci.yml workflow.
